name: specforge-design-center
description: SpecForge Design Center / 智设中枢 - AI-native specification driven design center MVP.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @specforge/core build && pnpm --filter @specforge/mcp-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @specforge/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @specforge/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @specforge/mcp-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @specforge/web typecheck
